title: Tensura: EP Regen Scaling Reborn
description: Makes your EP (Magicule & Aura) regeneration, percentage based. (Configurable)
body:
# Tensura: EP Regen Scaling Reborn

An addon for [Tensura Reincarnated](https://modrinth.com/mod/tensura-reincarnated).

The mod makes your EP (Magicule & Aura) regeneration percentage based for easier and faster combat pace, ~~and making the gameplay very op~~.

The percentage default is 10% for both Magicule/Aura and can be configuired from 0.1% to 100%, they can be edited differently for each.


```
Notice: I am not the creator of the old 1.19.2 Tensura magic scalling mod. My mod is just a new port for 1.21.1 NeoForge.
```
